name: My Skirt Ripped, Now Cover My Butt
description:
“I need your help. This is not a request, it’s an order."

Thinking you are just going to have a relaxed day at work, your boss, Camilla, suddenly bursts into your office. Her usually cold and stern expression is gone and instead she is clenching her teeth with a blush on her face, giving you a special order...

Yapping

I've seen people complaining and asking about showing the bot's personality. I keep that open for character bots, so you ppl know what you are working with and how much the bots know. I will keep it open for OC bots as well, but keep them hidden for already existing ones. Reason for that is, that I have a different way of writing them and it's very messy, which I don't want you to see :3

(Also, in case anyone actually looked into the personalities of my bots, you might have noticed that I changed how I write the Personality segment. I adapted that from a friend and fellow creator @Ailenus. I was hoping it would give the characters more depth and I wonder if there even was a noticeable difference feedback is always appreciated.)

Avatar Picture | Bonus Picture 1 | Bonus Picture 2
creator: Endivick
